termagants.notes: Default to the fleshborer loadout (the basic gun); devourer/spinefists options omitted. 'Endless Multitude' (return as Reinforcements) is out of scope for v1 — documented so it isn't forgotten. Corrections 2026-07-04 vs the original scaffold: the fleshborer is Strength 5 with [ASSAULT] in the current codex profile. Profile verified 2026-07-04: 10th-codex-current baseline (Wahapedia) confirmed unchanged by the official 11th-edition Faction Pack errata (June 2026).
